title: openpouch delete result
description: `openpouch delete <slug> --json` / MCP `openpouch_delete` — removes one of the ACCOUNT'S OWN deployments and frees a quota slot. Owner-only and auth-gated by design: anonymous callers receive error.schema.json with category `auth` (anonymous previews can't be deleted manually — they expire on their own). Contract: `required` guaranteed, additive evolution.
